title: Body Burden of Dichlorodiphenyl Dichloroethene (DDE) and Childhood Pulmonary Function.
summary: Longitudinal study investigating the relationship between blood DDE levels and pulmonary function in children aged 8-10 in Germany, specifically looking at mediation by height and weight.
key_findings: DDE measured at 8 years had significant, inverse, indirect, and total effects on FVC and FEV1 at 10 years, mediated through effects on height and weight.
population: Children aged 8-10 years in central Germany
limitations: Need for studies in regions with ongoing, high DDT application
